goal: #18 测试覆盖率提升: 补充 useSettings / system-prompt-builder / useCamera 单元测试

coverage_checklist.prompt_builder_tests: assert: system-prompt-builder.test.ts 覆盖 text_chat + video_call + aiName 注入

coverage_checklist.coverage_up: assert: 覆盖率从 76% 提升至 80%+
